bullets: Developed software for **ultrasonic non-destructive testing (NDT)** systems using **C++**, **Delphi**, **Flutter** and **React**.

Led development and maintenance of the company website in **Hugo** and documentation ecosystem, building docs platforms with **Docusaurus** and **Wiki.js**, and rewriting most **product documentation**.
Built and maintained **internal tools and utilities** in **Go**, **C++**, and **Python** to support engineering and operational workflows.
Drove adoption of **AI-assisted development** tools such as **GitHub Copilot**, improving team development speed by **30-50%**.
Used **Microsoft SSMS**, **Yellowfin** and **T-SQL** to create and modify data reports and views.
Performed **black box** testing of backend C# applications.
Created and maintained multiple websites using **Azure** and **Microsoft SharePoint**.

projects.name: PDF Cropper
bullets: Developed a **self-hosted PDF cropping tool** with a web interface, allowing users to split PDFs into multiple documents with **no loss in quality or OCR**.
Split in the middle of the page, or extend one page to cover the content of the next page.

projects.name: Directory Tracer
bullets: Built a command-line tool to generate interactive and searchable HTML visualizations of directory structures.
Implemented fuzzy search with **Fuse.js** for easy navigation of large file trees.
Compiled for support on Windows, Linux, and macOS with a single binary and no dependencies.

details: Teaching Assistant for **7 courses**, including Data Structures, Theoretical Foundations, and Operating Systems

bullets: Responsible for running the social media accounts and for managing the organization's finances
Collaborating with the Events team to organize and advertise events to facilitate student engagement on campus and online
Created the **Devpost** webpages for managing and hosting the hackathon
Organized and evaluated submissions with team of judges
